parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ business_name: $json.business_name, email: $json.email, first_name: $json.first_name, last_name: $json.last_name, phone: $json.phone, website: $json.website, domain: $json.domain, city: $json.city, state: $json.state, rating: $json.rating, reviews: $json.reviews, source: $json.source, status: 'new', email_verified: $json.email_verified || false, email_verify_result: $json.email_verify_result || null, created_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ message: 'Mass Lead Gen report ' + $json.dateStr, content: Buffer.from($json.report).toString('base64'), branch: 'main' }) }}

meta.notes:
Mass Lead Generator - Systematically scrapes auto repair shops from 100+ US cities. Runs weekly (Sunday 2AM) or on-demand via webhook POST /expand-lead-gen. Processes 10 city+query combos per batch. Uses SerpAPI for Google Maps scraping, Hunter.io for email enrichment, MillionVerifier for email validation. Saves validated leads to Supabase cold_email_leads table with status 'new'. Reports written to GitHub and notifications sent via Telegram agent-notify webhook.

Required environment variables: SERPAPI_API_KEY, HUNTER_API_KEY, MILLIONVERIFIER_API_KEY, SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY, GITHUB_TOKEN, TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN, TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID.

Expected yield: ~5-10 validated leads per city, 1,500-3,000 total over 30 weeks covering all 100+ major US cities with 3 query variations each.
